messages.body: Hi Acme Foods, pls raise an SO for 18 x Black tea cartons @ 17 USD. Thx. ✅
Got it - subtotal 306 USD. Confirm address and payment terms? ❗
Address: 212 Riverside Drive, Old Town. Payment: 50% advance.
Noted, sending SO draft today. 📦
Please share. We may add it to next month's order.
Also, share the test report for the new lot when ready.
Noted. Also, did you receive the previous invoice copy?
Great. One more thing - any new arrivals on Robusta?
Yes received, accounts team is processing it.
Yes Sundays closed, Saturdays half day until 1pm.
Will do later today after the inspection.
Update - logistics confirmed dispatch slot.
GST is unchanged, same as last invoice.
Quick check - is the warehouse still closed Sundays?
Talk soon.
It was good, picked up a few new SKUs to share next call.
Yes a fresh lot landed Tuesday, will share photos.
Perfect.
OK, talk soon.
Good. Forward the dispatch ETA once available.
By the way, how was the trade fair last week?
Sure, expecting confirmation from logistics in an hour.
Yes, lab results due by Friday.
Send the AWB once generated.
Will share by EOD.
Thanks. Also confirm the GST number we have on file.
